feat_arc_spellcasting.name: Arcanist's Spellcasting
feat_arc_spellcasting.description:
As a student of arcane magic, you have a spellbook containing spells that show the first glimmerings of your true power.

**Font of Power:** Your spellbook is your font of power. You must be wielding it to perform the Spellcasting feature of this class.

**Cantrips:** You know two cantrips from the arcanist list. You can transcribe more into your book (1h and 25gc each).

**Preparing Spells:** You don't need to 'prepare' in the traditional sense; while wielding your spellbook, you can cast any spell inscribed in it, provided you have the slots.

**Spellcasting Ability:** Intelligence is your ability for Arcanist spells.
* **Spell Save DC:** 8 + PB + Intelligence Modifier
* **Spell Attack Modifier:** PB + Intelligence Modifier

feat_arc_recovery.name: Arcane Recovery
feat_arc_recovery.description: Once per day when you finish a Short Rest, you can recover expended spell slots. The combined level of slots must be equal to or less than half your arcanist level (rounded up), and none can be 6th level or higher.

feat_arc_scripture.name: Arcane Scripture
feat_arc_scripture.description: Both your books and scrolls derive magic from their incantations, written in Arcanian runes. You have Expertise in Arcanian and another language with which you are proficient already.

feat_arc_tradition.name: Arcane Tradition
feat_arc_tradition.description: At 2nd level, you choose an arcane tradition, shaping your practice of magic through a specific school.

feat_arc_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_arc_asi.description: You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_arc_spell_mastery.name: Spell Mastery
feat_arc_spell_mastery.description: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level arcanist spell in your spellbook. You can cast those spells at their lowest level without expending a spell slot when you have them prepared.

feat_arc_signature.name: Signature Spells
feat_arc_signature.description: Choose two 3rd-level spells in your spellbook. They are always prepared and don't count against your limit. You can cast each once at 3rd level without expending a slot per short rest.

feat_arc_evo_savant.name: Evocation Savant
feat_arc_evo_savant.description: The gold and time you must spend to copy an evocation spell into your spellbook is halved.

feat_arc_evo_sculpt.name: Sculpt Spells
feat_arc_evo_sculpt.description: When you cast an evocation spell that affects other creatures, you can choose a number of them equal to 1 + the spell's level. The chosen creatures automatically succeed on their saving throws and take no damage.

feat_arc_evo_potent.name: Potent Cantrip
feat_arc_evo_potent.description: When a creature succeeds on a saving throw against your cantrip, it takes half damage (if any) but suffers no additional effects.

feat_arc_evo_empowered.name: Empowered Evocation
feat_arc_evo_empowered.description: You can add your Intelligence modifier to one damage roll of any arcanist evocation spell you cast.

feat_arc_evo_overchannel.name: Overchannel
feat_arc_evo_overchannel.description: When you cast an arcanist spell of 1st through 5th-level that deals damage, you can deal maximum damage. The first time is safe; subsequent uses before a long rest deal 2d12 necrotic damage to you per spell level, increasing by 1d12 each time.

classes.name: Arcanist
classes.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality through study and discipline.

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d6 (or 4) + your Constitution modifier per Arcanist level after 1st

proficiencies_desc.weapons: Daggers, darts, slings, quarterstaffs, light crossbows
proficiencies_desc.skills: Choose two from Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, or Religion

classes.starting_equipment:
Choose between:
(a) fine clothes or (b) a tool (below 30gp)
(a) a quarterstaff or (b) a dagger
(a) a component pouch or (b) an arcane focus
(a) a scholar's pack or (b) an explorer's pack
Spellbook
classes.quick_build: Intelligence should be your highest score, followed by Constitution or Dexterity. Choose the Sage background. For spells, pick Mage Hand, Light, Ray of Frost, and 1st-level spells like Magic Missile and Mage Armor.

subclasses.name: School of Evocation
subclasses.description: You focus your study on magic that creates powerful elemental effects.

subclasses.name: School of Enchantment
subclasses.description: Your magic focuses on influencing the minds of others.

subclasses.name: School of Necromancy
subclasses.description: You explore the cosmic forces of life, death, and undeath.

subclasses.name: School of Transmutation
subclasses.description: You study the physical properties of matter and how to alter them.
